name: Green Beans in Basil-Walnut Vinaigrette
recipeInstructions:
For presentation purposes, the author suggests
placing the radicchio or red cabbage leaves on
individual salad plates and piling the green beans
on top.
Bring water to a rolling boil. Add green beans and
cook until just tender-crisp. Immediately drain into
a colander and pour over ice water to stop cooking.
Drain well.
In blender or food processor, combine garlic,
basil, salt, and pepper. Pulse on and off, then add
mustard and vinegar. Pulse until smooth. Slowly add
oil in a thin stream while the machine runs until fully
blended.
Transfer beans to a serving bowl and pour vinaigrette over them. Toss to coat evenly.
Garnish with scallions and walnuts.
Yield: 6 to 8 servings.
